<!--
Thanks for contributing to SeeDAO Skills! 感谢贡献！
Please read CONTRIBUTING.md first. 请先阅读 CONTRIBUTING.md。
-->

## Summary · 概述
<!-- What does this PR do, and why? / 这个 PR 做了什么、为什么？ -->


## Related issue · 关联 issue
<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->


## Affected skill(s) · 受影响的 skill
<!-- e.g. community-llm-wiki, feishu-multi-agent / 例如 community-llm-wiki、feishu-multi-agent -->


## Type of change · 改动类型
- [ ] `feat` — new skill · 新增 skill
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix in a skill · 修复 skill 缺陷
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only · 仅文档
- [ ] `refactor` / `chore` — structure or metadata cleanup · 结构或元数据整理

## Checklist · 自查清单
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) · 已阅读贡献指南
- [ ] New or updated `SKILL.md` follows the frontmatter convention · `SKILL.md` 元数据格式符合约定
- [ ] `README.md` is updated for human readers · `README.md` 已同步更新
- [ ] Scripts are placed under `scripts/` (if any) · 脚本已放在 `scripts/` 下（如有）
- [ ] No large files or secrets committed · 未提交大文件或密钥
- [ ] License is consistent with repo root · 许可证与仓库根目录一致
- [ ] I tested the skill behavior in an agent when possible · 已尽量在 Agent 中验证行为
